title: Web3 Indicator Entry with FIDLEG Extension

regulatoryExtensions.description: Modular regulatory extensions for different jurisdictions

articleReference.description: FIDLEG article reference. See article-reference.md for detailed article descriptions.

measurementFrequency.description: Required measurement frequency for Swiss regulatory reporting. See fidleg-fields-guide.md for frequency definitions.

regulatoryThreshold.description: Compliance threshold for Swiss regulatory reporting

auditRequirement.description: Required audit level for Swiss compliance. See fidleg-fields-guide.md for audit level definitions.

reportingThreshold.description: Threshold for regulatory reporting (e.g., 'CHF_100k' for retail transactions)

suspiciousPatterns.description: Suspicious trading patterns to monitor. See suspicious-patterns.md for detailed explanations and thresholds.

gwg.description: Swiss Anti-Money Laundering Act (GwG) specific requirements

mrosReporting.description: Whether MROS (Money Laundering Reporting Office Switzerland) reporting is required

transactionMonitoring.description: Whether continuous transaction monitoring is required

customerDueDiligence.description: Whether enhanced customer due diligence is triggered

additionalProperties.description: Additional regulatory extensions for other jurisdictions
